name: cerc-hub

metadata.name: cerc-hub
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Library or Lesser General Public License (LGPL)
metadata.summary: CERC Hub consist of a set of classes (Central data model), importers and exporters to help researchers to create better and more sustainable cities

documentation:
CERC Hub consist of a set of classes (Central data model), importers and exporters to help researchers to create better and more sustainable cities.

Developed at Concordia university in Canada as part of the research group from the Next Generation Cities Institute, our aim among others is to provide a comprehensive set of tools to help researchers and urban developers to make decisions to improve the livability and efficiency of our cities

the total (opaque + transparent) area of that wall if windows are defined in the geometry imported.

If none of those sources are available, it returns None.

methods.name: hub.city_model_structure.energy_systems.performance_curve.PerformanceCurves.curve_type
documentation:
Get the type of the fit function from the following
Linear =>>> y = a + b\*x
Exponential =>>> y = a\*(b\*\*x)
Second degree polynomial =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2)
Power =>>> y = a\*(x\*\*b)
Bi-Quadratic =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2) + d\*z + e\*(z\*\*2) + f\*x\*z

Get the type of function from \['linear', 'exponential', 'second degree polynomial', 'power', 'bi-quadratic'\]
\:return: string

methods.name: hub.city_model_structure.energy_systems.performance_curve.PerformanceCurves.curve_type
documentation:

Linear =>>> y = a + b\*x
Exponential =>>> y = a\*(b\*\*x)
Second degree polynomial =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2)
Power =>>> y = a\*(x\*\*b)
Bi-Quadratic =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2) + d\*z + e\*(z\*\*2) + f\*x\*z

The type of the fit function from the following
Linear =>>> y = a + b\*x
Exponential =>>> y = a\*(b\*\*x)
Second degree polynomial =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2)
Power =>>> y = a\*(x\*\*b)
Bi-Quadratic =>>> y = a + b\*x + c\*(x\*\*2) + d\*z + e\*(z\*\*2) + f\*x\*z

Get the type of function from \['linear', 'exponential', 'second degree polynomial', 'power', 'bi-quadratic'\]

methods.name: hub.helpers.thermal_zones_creation.ThermalZonesCreation.thermal_zones_from_storeys
documentation:
Create and get thermal zones as 1 per each storey
\:return: \[ThermalZone\]
# The agreement is that the layers are defined from outside to inside
external_layer = catalog_construction.layers[0]
external_surface = thermal_boundary.parent_surface
external_surface.short_wave_reflectance = 1 - external_layer.material.solar_absorptance
external_surface.long_wave_emittance = 1 - external_layer.material.solar_absorptance
internal_layer = catalog_construction.layers[len(catalog_construction.layers) - 1]
internal_surface = thermal_boundary.internal_surface
internal_surface.short_wave_reflectance = 1 - internal_layer.material.solar_absorptance
internal_surface.long_wave_emittance = 1 - internal_layer.material.solar_absorptance

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.min_coordinate
documentation:
Get configured minimal coordinate value
\:return: -1.7976931348623157e+308

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.max_coordinate
documentation:
Get configured maximal coordinate value
\:return: 1.7976931348623157e+308

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_lighting_latent
documentation:
Get configured latent ratio of internal gains do to lighting used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_lighting_convective
documentation:
Get configured convective ratio of internal gains do to lighting used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.5

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_lighting_radiant
documentation:
Get configured radiant ratio of internal gains do to lighting used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.5

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_plugs_latent
documentation:
Get configured latent ratio of internal gains do to electrical appliances used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_plugs_convective
documentation:
Get configured convective ratio of internal gains do to electrical appliances used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.75

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_plugs_radiant
documentation:
Get configured radiant ratio of internal gains do to electrical appliances used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.25

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_occupancy_sensible_convective
documentation:
Get configured convective ratio of the sensible part of internal gains do to occupancy
used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.9

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.comnet_occupancy_sensible_radiant
documentation:
Get configured radiant ratio of the sensible part of internal gains do to occupancy
used for Comnet (ASHRAE) standard
\:return: 0.1

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.convective_heat_transfer_coefficient_interior
documentation:
Get configured convective heat transfer coefficient for surfaces inside the building
\:return: 3.5 W/m2K

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.convective_heat_transfer_coefficient_exterior
documentation:
Get configured convective heat transfer coefficient for surfaces outside the building
\:return: 20 W/m2K

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.soil_conductivity
documentation:
Get configured soil conductivity for surfaces touching the ground
\:return: 3 W/mK

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.soil_thickness
documentation:
Get configured soil thickness for surfaces touching the ground
\:return: 0.5 m

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.short_wave_reflectance
documentation:
Get configured short wave reflectance for surfaces that don't have construction assigned
\:return: 0.3

methods.name: hub.helpers.configuration_helper.ConfigurationHelper.cold_water_temperature
documentation:
Get configured cold water temperature in Celsius
\:return: 10
